ownership_lead: At Rose&Co I.T Solutions, we understand that every business operates differently — that’s why we offer flexible system ownership models tailored to your needs.
ownership_managed_text: For businesses that prefer a seamless, hands-off experience, our Managed Service Model allows you to focus entirely on operations while we take care of the technology.
ownership_managed_li_4: Continuous improvements as your business evolves
ownership_managed_footer: This model is ideal if you want a reliable, fully supported system without the need to manage technical aspects internally.
ownership_managed_callout: We also ensure that the system is custom-built around your workflow, processes, and business requirements — so it works exactly the way you need it to.
ownership_full_text: For businesses that want complete control, we offer a Full Ownership Model, where you gain full rights to the system, including the source code and overall proprietorship.
ownership_full_li_1: Full ownership of the software and codebase
ownership_full_li_2: Freedom to scale, modify, or expand the system anytime
ownership_full_li_4: Optional on-call maintenance and technical support
ownership_full_footer: Just like our managed approach, this model is also fully customizable based on your specific business needs — ensuring the system aligns perfectly with your operations.
ownership_pricing_lead: At Rose&Co I.T Solutions, we take pride in delivering top-notch, high-quality systems designed to meet real business demands.
ownership_pricing_text: While our solutions are built with premium standards, we remain committed to offering competitive and accessible pricing, especially for growing businesses.
ownership_pricing_footer: Every project is carefully scoped to ensure you get the best value for your investment, with flexible options depending on your preferred model and level of customization.
why_us_lead: Clear, practical, and built for real operations.
why_us_feature_3: Scalable—from small teams to large organizations
why_us_feature_4: Strong focus on data privacy and reliability

testimonial_1_text: “As an author and blogger managing multiple websites, working with Rose & Co IT Solutions has been game-changing. I’m not always able to explain things in technical terms, but they have a way of understanding what I need and turning my ideas into something real. It's incredibly exciting to see a concept or feature you’ve imagined come to life in a way that’s not only functional, but also clean and intuitive to use. They’re quick, reliable, and truly care about getting everything just right. It’s always a pleasure working with them.”
products_lead: Ready-to-use digital tools designed to help you grow.
product_kitako_title: KitaKo App – Business Tracker for Filipino Online Sellers
product_kitako_text:
KitaKo is a mobile business tracker for Filipino online sellers, featuring a Taglish interface that makes managing sales and expenses simple and intuitive. Developed by Rose&Co, it helps entrepreneurs track daily performance without relying on spreadsheets or notebooks.

Built around local selling behaviors, KitaKo streamlines record-keeping, improves financial awareness, and enables smarter business decisions.
product_zensys_title: ZenSys App – Management System for Spa Owners
product_zensys_text:
ZenSys is a cloud-based management platform designed specifically for spa owners to streamline operations and replace manual tracking. It provides real-time oversight of sales, staff, and bookings directly from your smartphone.

Built for MSMEs, ZenSys helps owners eliminate discrepancies, monitor therapist availability, and manage their business remotely with an interface as intuitive as social media.
